Compromise Of An Adult Person With A Disability (Washington)
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Compromise Of An Adult Person With A Disability (Washington)
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Two Compromise of an Adult Person with a Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Donna R. Heuman, Esq. for Petitioner: Nancy d. Rasch, present as Guardian ad litem for Claimants: Towan Moody and Tshaka Washington, appearance of the claimants were waived by the court at the last hearing.
Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and each compromise is approved in the amount of $33,333.33
Fee to Guardaina Ad Litem for $750.00
Balance of $32,583.33, with $333.33 to be distributed to each Claimant, the remaining balance of $32,250.00 to be placed in a Special Needs Trust under The Good Shepherd Fund for the benefit of each Claimant.
Order(s) Approving Compromise for each claim signed in open court.

Compromise Of An Adult Person With A Disability (Moody)
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Continued To Jul-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of an Adult with Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Nancy Rasch, Esq., present as Guardian ad litem for Claimants.
Donna Heuman, Esq. present as Attorney of Record for the Plaintiff: Zachary Wheeler.
Peggy Doyle, Esq. for Defendant: Staples.
Matter is stipulated by counsels to put over to July 26, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for
Ms. Rasch to sub-in and file the Amended Petitions.

Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Two Compromise of Person with a Disablility hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Salceda.
Donna Heuman, Esq. as Petitioner for: Tshaka Washington and Tawan Moody, the disable adult Claimants, was sworn and examined.
Peggy Dole, Esq. for Defendant: Staples, Inc. is also present in court.
After hearing the testimony of Ms. Heuman, the each Petition is Denied without prejudice, Counsel to prepare the Orders.
